changeSet.author: openelis

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name = 'Results entry' LIMIT 1

changeSet.sql:
INSERT INTO clinlims.system_user_role (system_user_id, role_id) SELECT sur.system_user_id, (SELECT id FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name = 'Results') FROM clinlims.system_user_role sur WHERE sur.role_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name = 'Results entry') AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM clinlims.system_user_role x WHERE x.system_user_id = sur.system_user_id AND x.role_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name = 'Results') );
DELETE FROM clinlims.system_user_role WHERE role_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name = 'Results entry');

rollback.sql: SELECT 1; -- rollback not supported for data migrations

changeSet.author: openelis

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name = 'Validator' LIMIT 1

changeSet.sql:
INSERT INTO clinlims.system_user_role (system_user_id, role_id) SELECT sur.system_user_id, (SELECT id FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name = 'Validation') FROM clinlims.system_user_role sur WHERE sur.role_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name = 'Validator') AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM clinlims.system_user_role x WHERE x.system_user_id = sur.system_user_id AND x.role_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name = 'Validation') );
DELETE FROM clinlims.system_user_role WHERE role_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name = 'Validator');

rollback.sql: SELECT 1; -- rollback not supported for data migrations

changeSet.author: openelis

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name = 'Results Admin' LIMIT 1

changeSet.sql:
INSERT INTO clinlims.system_user_role (system_user_id, role_id) SELECT sur.system_user_id, (SELECT id FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name = 'Results') FROM clinlims.system_user_role sur WHERE sur.role_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name = 'Results Admin') AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM clinlims.system_user_role x WHERE x.system_user_id = sur.system_user_id AND x.role_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name = 'Results') );
DELETE FROM clinlims.system_user_role WHERE role_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name = 'Results Admin');

rollback.sql: SELECT 1; -- rollback not supported for data migrations
